import pandas as pd
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'

    'IAPP/Daval2010/Fits/Daval2010_sec/fit.tsv',
    'Abeta/Meisl2014/Fits/Meisl2014_sec/fit.tsv',
    'Alphasyn_Gaspar2017/03uM_seed all/Fits/Gaspar2017_seed/fit.tsv',
]
import os, glob
all_fits = glob.glob(base + '**/fit.tsv', recursive=True)

    print(f.replace(base,''))
    print('  shape:', df.shape, 'cols:', list(df.columns)[:6])
    print('  head:', df.head(2).to_string())
    print()

args.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd, glob
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'
all_fits = glob.glob(base + '**/fit.tsv', recursive=True)
print(f'Total: {len(all_fits)}')
for f in all_fits[3:10]:
    df = pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t')
    cols = list(df.columns)
    print(f.replace(base,''))
    print('  shape:', df.shape, 'cols:', cols[:5])
    # show range of X and values
    print('  X range:', df['X'].min(), '->', df['X'].max())
    val_col = cols[1]
    print('  Y range:', df[val_col].min(), '->', df[val_col].max())
    print()
"

python3 -c "
import pandas as pd, glob
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'
all_fits = glob.glob(base + '**/fit.tsv', recursive=True)
# Check multi-column files (multiple experimental parameters)
multi = [f for f in all_fits if pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t').shape[1] > 3]
print(f'Multi-column files: {len(multi)}')
for f in multi[:4]:
    df = pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t')
    print(f.replace(base,''))
    print('  cols:', list(df.columns))
    print()
"
